entry.title: New: BILL007(25) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Public Safety & Customer Services, to Public Safety & Economy Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE FIRE CODE.

Amends the Fire Code to increase the penalties for the possession, use, explosion, or causing to explode any aerial device, articles pyrotechnic, or display fireworks within the City and County of Honolulu to more closely comport with State law.

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Public Safety & Customer Services, to Public Safety & Economy Committee.

View on the council site
